languages.text: "Рефракционный трансмутатор начал переиначивать тело Нунциуса на молекулярном уровне. Металл обращался в плоть, а плоть в металл в чудовищном цикле дурной бесконечности. Иногда у него получалось кричать, но через секунду голосовые связки обращались в свинец, а язык в олово и крики резко обрывались. У меня не было времени на раздумья — чтобы спасти его жизнь, мне пришлось наскоро модифицировать стазис-сацеллум и погрузить туда Нунциуса вместе с артефактом. Это не остановило агонию, но теперь Нунциус не мог умереть. У меня появился шанс найти решение".

"The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. At times, he would produce a scream, but after a second his vocal cords would turn to lead and his tongue to tin, and the screams would abruptly cut off. I had no time to reflect — to save his life, I had to hastily modify the stasis sacellum and immerse Nuncius in it along with the artefact. It did not stop the agony, but it did stop him from dying. It gave me the chance to find a solution."
languages.original_text: "Рефракционный трансмутатор начал переиначивать тело Нунциуса на молекулярном уровне. Металл обращался в плоть, а плоть в металл в чудовищном цикле дурной бесконечности. Иногда у него получалось кричать, но через секунду голосовые связки обращались в свинец, а язык в олово и крики резко обрывались. Это не остановило агонию, но теперь Нунциус не мог умереть. У меня появился шанс найти решение".

languages.text: «El transmutador refractivo empezó a reorganizar el cuerpo de Nuncius a nivel molecular. El metal se transformó en carne y viceversa en un ciclo monstruoso e interminable. En ocasiones, emitía un grito, pero al cabo de un segundo sus cuerdas vocales se transformaban en plomo, su lengua en hojalata, y los gritos cesaban. No tuve tiempo para reflexionar. Para salvar su vida, tuve que modificar el sacelio de suspensión e introducir a Nuncius junto con el artefacto. No detuvo la agonía, pero sí evitó su muerte. Me dio tiempo a encontrar una solución».
languages.original_text: "The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. At times, he would produce a scream, but after a second his vocal cords would turn to lead and his tongue to tin, and the screams would abruptly cut off. I had no time to reflect — to save his life, I had to hastily modify the stasis sacellum and immerse Nuncius in it along with the artefact. It did not stop the agony, but it did stop him from dying. It gave me the chance to find a solution."

traits.locale_text: «El transmutador refractivo empezó a reorganizar el cuerpo de Nuncius a nivel molecular. El metal se transformó en carne y viceversa en un ciclo monstruoso e interminable. En ocasiones, emitía un grito, pero al cabo de un segundo sus cuerdas vocales se transformaban en plomo, su lengua en hojalata, y los gritos cesaban. No tuve tiempo para reflexionar. Para salvar su vida, tuve que modificar el sacelio de suspensión e introducir a Nuncius junto con el artefacto. No detuvo la agonía, pero sí evitó su muerte. Me dio tiempo a encontrar una solución».

languages.text: “折射转化仪开始在分子层面上重构努恩修斯的身体。金属化作血肉，血肉变成金属——恐怖又邪恶的无尽循环。有时他会发出一声惨叫，但一秒钟后他的声带就会变成铅，舌头变成锡，惨叫声便戛然而止。我没有时间思考——为了救他的命，我只能急忙改造静滞神龛，将他和造物一起浸入其中。这没能停止他的痛苦，但确实保住了他的性命，从而给了我寻找解决方案的机会。”
languages.original_text: "The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. At times, he would produce a scream, but after a second his vocal cords would turn to lead and his tongue to tin, and the screams would abruptly cut off. I had no time to reflect — to save his life, I had to hastily modify the stasis sacellum and immerse Nuncius in it along with the artefact. It did not stop the agony, but it did stop him from dying. It gave me the chance to find a solution."

languages.text: « Le transmutateur réfractif a commencé à altérer le corps de Nuncius au niveau moléculaire, changeant le métal en chair et inversement dans un épouvantable cycle sans fin. Il lui arrivait parfois de hurler, mais seulement une seconde, car ses cordes vocales se transformaient immédiatement en plomb et sa langue, en étain. Je n'ai pas eu le temps de réfléchir. Pour lui sauver la vie, j'ai dû modifier le sacellum de stase à la va-vite et y placer Nuncius avec l'artefact. Cette mesure improvisée n'a pas stoppé son supplice, mais elle l'a empêché de mourir et m'a ainsi donné une chance de trouver une solution. »
languages.original_text: "The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. At times, he would produce a scream, but after a second his vocal cords would turn to lead and his tongue to tin, and the screams would abruptly cut off. I had no time to reflect — to save his life, I had to hastily modify the stasis sacellum and immerse Nuncius in it along with the artefact. It did not stop the agony, but it did stop him from dying. It gave me the chance to find a solution."

languages.text: "Kırılmalı dönüştürücü, Nuncius'un bedenini moleküler düzeyde yeniden düzenlemeye başladı. Çarpık bir sonsuzluğun korkunç döngüsünde metal ete, et metale dönüştü. Bazen çığlık atıyordu ama bir saniye sonra ses telleri kurşuna, dili kalaya dönüşüyor ve çığlıklar aniden kesiliyordu. Düşünecek vaktim yoktu... Hayatını kurtarmak için staz şapelini aceleyle değiştirmem ve Nuncius'u eserle birlikte içine daldırmam gerekti. Bu acıyı durdurmasa da ölmesini engelledi. Bana çözüm bulma fırsatı sundu."
languages.original_text: "The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. At times, he would produce a scream, but after a second his vocal cords would turn to lead and his tongue to tin, and the screams would abruptly cut off. I had no time to reflect — to save his life, I had to hastily modify the stasis sacellum and immerse Nuncius in it along with the artefact. It did not stop the agony, but it did stop him from dying. It gave me the chance to find a solution."

languages.text: "Der Refraktionstransmuter setzte Nuncius' Körper auf molekularer Ebene neu zusammen. Metall wurde zu Fleisch und Fleisch erstarrte in einem monströsen Kreislauf zu Metall. Zunächst schrie er noch, aber als seine Stimmbänder zu Blei wurden und sich seine Zunge in Zinn verwandelte, brachen seine Schreie mit einem Mal ab. Mir blieb keine Zeit, nachzudenken ... um ihm das Leben zu retten, musste ich das Stascen-Sacellum hastig modifizieren und Nuncius darin zusammen mit dem Artefakt einschließen. Das beendete zwar nicht seinen Schmerz, bewahrte ihn aber vor dem Tod. So hatte ich die Chance, eine Lösung zu finden."
languages.original_text: "The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. languages.text: 「屈折トランスミューターはヌンシウスの体を分子レベルで再配列し始めた。金属は肉に、肉は金属へと、邪悪な無限大の怪物のようなサイクルを繰り返した。時折、彼は悲鳴を上げたが、1秒後には声帯は鉛に、舌は錫に変わり、悲鳴は突然途絶えた。彼の命を救うため、私は急遽ステイシス・サセラムを改造し、アーティファクトとともにヌンシウスをその中に沈めなければならなかった。苦痛を止めることはできなかったが、彼の死を食い止めることはできた。解決策を見つけるチャンスを与えてくれたんだ」。
languages.original_text: "The refractive transmuter began to rearrange Nuncius's body on a molecular level. Metal turned to flesh, and flesh to metal in a monstrous cycle of wicked infinity. At times, he would produce a scream, but after a second his vocal cords would turn to lead and his tongue to tin, and the screams would abruptly cut off. I had no time to reflect — to save his life, I had to hastily modify the stasis sacellum and immerse Nuncius in it along with the artefact. It did not stop the agony, but it did stop him from dying. It gave me the chance to find a solution."
